official_functions.role: Construct the official singleton reset_chat packet fixture
Write the official Configuration clientbound reset_chat body; bytecode initializes it with StreamCodec.unit(INSTANCE)
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed reset_chat packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed reset_chat packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state
Read the decoded reset_chat packet type from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the reset_chat body.
The official ClientboundResetChatPacket.STREAM_CODEC is a singleton unit codec and writes an empty body.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundResetChatPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundResetChatPacket preserves the reset_chat packet type and singleton identity.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, singleton equality, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove chat UI reset behavior, screen flow, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer chat UI reset behavior, screen flow, Configuration-to-Play readiness, registry hydration, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
